title: Carl
description: Quack Quack! Carl the Space Duck - DejojoTheAwsome's silly, little companion
body: Quack? Quack quack quack qua quack  qua quack qua qua quack quack quack qua quack qua quack quack qua. Quack, quack qua quack, quack, quack, quack. Quack! Translation: Honestly? Just a really simple duck mod adding Carl the Space Duck from DejojoTheAwsome's channel. Yes, that's it, a cute, silly, little guy. Have fun! **DejojoTheAwsome's Create: Mekanized Finale - rescued Carl! (note: Carl cannot naturally be found on Glacio if Ad Astra is installed)** This little duck can be occasionally found in Snow Igloo chests - and also accessed from the creative menu. Additionally, a new Smithing Template can be found here that allows you to 'revitalize' your new friend. If this little goofball here somehow meets his demise - don't worry! He'll drop in item form, of which can be combined with a water bucket and the previously mentioned Smithing Template to return him to you in bucket form! In versions without a Smithing Template, the process is nearly identical, just without the template.
